holdings.infoBox: SQLT is an equity ETF with a total of 504 individual holdings. The top holdings are BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY stock at 1.30%, National Fuel Gas Company at 1.09%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.04%, TD SYNNEX at 0.96%, and Woodward at 0.96%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI USA Small-Cap Quality Factor ETF (SQLT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks, selected and weighted by high ROE, low earnings fluctuations, and low leverage, relative to peers in each sector. SQLT was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Small Cap Sector Neutral Quality Index
